description_long: This bungalow is a modern, single-story residential building surrounded by a lush landscape of various trees and shrubs, including tall palms and conifers. The structure features a flat and gently sloped roof with multiple sections, and large windows that provide ample natural light. The front of the house includes a driveway and a visible swimming pool, with a patio area adjacent to the pool. The property is enclosed by a low wall, and the garden is meticulously landscaped with a mix of evergreen and flowering plants. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the darker roof and window frames. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor living spaces and a strong connection to the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat and gently sloped roof, large windows, a swimming pool, and lush landscaping with various trees and shrubs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, swimming pool, and a landscaped garden with a variety of trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the patio area, pool, and the arrangement of trees and shrubs around the property.
description_view_2: Rear view with more emphasis on the backyard landscaping and the back facade of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Angled view showing both the pool area and the side garden, with a clear view of the roof structure and surrounding trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
